CheckTitle: Okta password policies lock accounts after 3 or fewer failed attempts
Description: Every active Okta Password Policy should enforce password lockout after 3 or fewer failed attempts.
Risk: Weak or inconsistent password policy settings increase credential guessing, reuse, and account takeover risk for users governed by less strict policies.

Code.Other: Security > Authentication > Password: edit each active password policy and adjust password settings to the STIG requirement.

Recommendation.Text: Update every active Okta Password Policy to enforce password lockout after 3 or fewer failed attempts.
